manipulators.description: Ghostty: Hyper + comma -> tmux previous window
Ghostty: Hyper + period -> tmux next window

rules.description: Right Option: current app numeric jump and tmux buffer controls

manipulators.description: Ghostty: Right Option + [ -> tmux copy mode
Ghostty: Right Option + ] -> tmux paste buffer
Ghostty: Right Option + , -> tmux swap window left
Ghostty: Right Option + . -> tmux swap window right
Ghostty: Right Option + \ -> tmux prefix v
Ghostty: Right Option + - -> tmux prefix V
Ghostty: Right Option + z -> tmux zoom pane
Ghostty: Right Option + i -> copy tmux pane id
Ghostty: Right Option + n -> tmux prefix c
Ghostty: Right Option + x -> tmux prefix x

rules.description: Hyper + d/s + h/l: Ghostty tmux swap pane/window
